title: Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tech Mahindra Holdings Services:
Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra Holdings Services!
